static_proof.notes: Workflow fixes only — no source code changed. pnpm verify green on b4188980.

queries.description: provider_offer_current freshness — latest updated_at and total rows
queries.sql: SELECT MAX(updated_at), COUNT(*), EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(updated_at)))/60 AS age_minutes FROM provider_offer_current
SELECT MAX(created_at), COUNT(*) FROM provider_offer_history WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'

queries.description: provider_offer_current breakdown by provider/sport in last hour
queries.sql: SELECT provider_key, sport_key, COUNT(*) AS offer_count, MAX(updated_at) FROM provider_offer_current WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY provider_key, sport_key

runtime_proof.freshness_result: FRESH — age ~4 minutes at time of query (threshold 60m)
runtime_proof.stage_freshness_output: [✓] Offers FRESH age=4m latest 4m ago, 1523 rows in window (threshold 60m)

ingestion_path_verified.diagnostic_run_result: partial — offer ingest phase SUCCESS (1523 offers written); results/repoll phase FAILED (transient Supabase 521 errors, non-fatal for freshness proof)
